name: Tax-Exempt Cider Receipt for Distillation

eligibility.description: Applies to distilled spirits plant operators receiving specific tax-exempt cider for the production of spirits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Cider that is exempt from tax under section 5042(a)(1) may be received on the bonded premises of a distilled spirits plant without triggering immediate tax liability.
